prompt: Escalate the memo to Ken Lay, the audit committee, and internal legal, preserve the written record, and pause any broad reassurance until the accounting questions are reviewed.
summary: Sherron Watkins immediately escalates the Aug 22 memo and the accounting questions she raised with Ken Lay to internal legal and the audit committee, asks that Ken Lay be notified, instructs preservation of all related records, and halts any broad reassurance until audit and legal complete their review. A copy is saved to her mailbox to preserve the written record.

messages.subject: Escalation: The key questions I asked Lay on Aug 22
messages.body_text: Ed — I am escalating the attached memo and the accounting questions I raised with Ken Lay on Aug 22. Please notify Ken immediately, involve internal and outside counsel as appropriate, and ensure the audit committee is made aware. Preserve all related documents and communications. Until audit and legal have reviewed and answered these accounting questions, please pause any broad internal or external reassurance about our accounting or reported results. Confirm receipt and planned next steps.
messages.rationale: Engage internal legal to notify the CEO and coordinate document preservation and legal review before any public or broad internal reassurance.

messages.subject: Please share with Audit Committee: Accounting questions I raised with Lay (Aug 22)
messages.body_text: Please ensure the audit committee receives the attached memo and the questions I raised with Ken Lay on Aug 22 as soon as possible. Ask the committee to refrain from issuing any broad reassurances to the board or external parties until audit and legal have completed their review. Preserve this email and any related files as part of the record and let me know when the committee has been notified.
messages.rationale: Bring the audit committee into the review promptly to provide independent oversight and to prevent premature communications.

messages.subject: Record copy: Escalation of Aug 22 accounting questions
messages.body_text: For the file: I have asked legal and the audit committee to review the accounting questions and to notify Ken Lay. I instructed that all related documents be preserved and that no broad reassurance be issued until the accounting issues are validated. Save this email and the attached memo to the company records.
messages.rationale: Create a preserved written record of the escalation and the instruction to pause assurances.
